response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong track record at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta) and deep expertise in high-scale systems, testing frameworks, and AI-agent infrastructure. However, while he meets the seniority and technical scale requirements, his resume lacks direct experience architecting the core domain systems required for this role, specifically enterprise experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, and telemetry pipelines.
strengths: Proven Staff-level engineering experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) with high-scale systems.
Deep expertise in software quality, having built custom testing frameworks and driven TDD practices.
Strong alignment with the AI requirement, currently building AI-agent infrastructure at Google.
concerns: No explicitly mentioned experience building experimentation platforms or feature-flagging frameworks.
Lacks demonstrated background in statistical bias detection, metrics analysis, or rollout-risk management.
Domain experience leans toward GIS and general full-stack rather than growth and telemetry foundations.
